case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO- TAX COLLECTOR VS ZELAYA ARMANDO

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 704475 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO- TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ZELAYA ARMANDO
